sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id UInt32, _map Map(String, UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_map VALUES (1, map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2)), (2, map('key3', 3, 'key4', 4));
SELECT mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v * 10), _map) AS transformed_map FROM test_map;
UPDATE test_map SET _map = mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v + 5), _map) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, mapApply((k, v) -> (k, v * 2), _map) AS doubled_map FROM test_map WHERE id = 2;
